questionText: Which part of the concrete value chain does your organization operate in?
questionKo: 귀사는 concrete 가치사슬의 어느 단계에서 운영합니까?
simpleHelp: CDP aims to deliver a more focused questionnaire for organizations that operate in the concrete value chain. Answers given here allow investors and data users to more accurately compare responses across organizations and industries.

guidance.text:
General 
Select all activities that occur inside your organizational boundary.
Production of raw materials or intermediary products for sale or own consumption is applicable.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Select all activities that occur inside your 조직경계. Production of raw materials 또는 intermediary products for sale 또는 own consumption is 해당되는 경우.

guidance.text:
Alternative "low CO 2 " cementitious materials (also referred to as
"low-CO 2 materials" and "alternative low-CO 2 cements/binders"): Alternative binding systems that represent a major shift from the traditional process of producing Portland clinker and cement, e.g. alkali activated cements. These alternative cements reduce CO 2 process emissions, which are significant and inherent in Portland clinker production.
guidance.textKo: Alternative "low CO 2 " cementitious materials (also referred to as "low-CO 2 materials" 및 "alternative low-CO 2 cements/binders"): Alternative binding systems that represent a major shift from the traditional 프로세스 of producing Portland clinker 및 cement, e.g. alkali activated cements. These alternative cements reduce CO 2 프로세스 emissions, which are significant 및 inherent in Portland clinker production.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Any option selected - 4/4 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected - 0/8 points
A maximum of 0/8 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 선택지가 하나라도 선택된 경우 - 4/4 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 4/4점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 선택지가 선택되지 않은 경우 - 0/8 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/8점입니다.
